scope: adversarial verification of 25 commits / 248h UX-RM (F1-F8) + hardening (R1-R13, R5-PHASE1/2/3)
method: 14 adversarial reports across 3 phases, cross-checked against live code by synthesis agent; inter-report contradictions resolved by direct file reads

recommended_before_cobaia_non_blocking: PA-F1 gateway access_matrix (hermes-llm + hermes-hunter) if cobaia uses brain LLM routing or email verify
aware: Today-Queue + Sentry-banner panels poll-only (60s), not real-time WS

findings.description: hermes-llm MCP is status:active in config.yaml:92 (F.5.7 LLM routing dispatcher, required_by_dc F.6/F.7/F.4/F.8) but has ZERO rule in access_matrix.json. With default_policy:deny, any requester calling mcp.hermes-llm.route gets 403 access_denied_by_matrix unless it resolves to brain-core/api wildcard.
findings.evidence: config.yaml:92 status:active; access_matrix.json rules lines 5-19 have no hermes-llm entry; brain-f7-cobaia (line14) allows only [sentry,hermes-linkedin,hermes-prospects]. Brain.decide() documented default mcp.hermes-llm.route(task_type=reasoning) per config.yaml:101.
findings.fix: Add hermes-llm to allow-lists of brain/brain-f4/f5/f6/f7-cobaia/f7-cobaia-autotune/f8/f9 requesters that dispatch LLM routing; restart gateway.

findings.description: hermes-hunter MCP is status:active in config.yaml:21 (R7 Hunter.io email verifier) but missing from access_matrix.json. brain-f7-cobaia rule allows [sentry,hermes-linkedin,hermes-prospects] only. EmailVerifier.verify_email() dispatch to hermes-hunter hits fail-closed 403.
findings.evidence: config.yaml:21 status:active R7; core/email_verifier.py uses per-role bearer BRAIN_F7_COBAIA, dispatches hermes-hunter at line 225; access_matrix.json:14 lacks hermes-hunter.
findings.fix: Add hermes-hunter to brain-f7-cobaia allow-list; restart gateway.

findings.description: Phase-1 dead-code auditor FALSELY claimed window.sequenceDryRun never invoked and /dry-run endpoint unreachable. Direct grep proves it IS wired: sequence_canvas.js:385-386 calls window.sequenceDryRun.open(). Phase-2 api-coverage report corroborates endpoint is called. This is an AUDITOR ERROR, not a code defect.
findings.evidence: sequence_canvas.js:385: if(window.sequenceDryRun){ window.sequenceDryRun.open(self._sequenceId,{...}) }. sequence_dry_run.js:132 calls /dry-run endpoint.
findings.fix: None — documented to prevent owner wasting effort 'fixing' working code.

findings.description: F4-B claimed '25 emoji replaced / 0 remaining'. Reality: 23 bare emoji remain across 4+ files. CHANNEL_ICONS uses bare emoji; status indicators use textContent emoji.
findings.evidence: sequence_dry_run.js:18 CHANNEL_ICONS={linkedin:'💼',email:'✉️',whatsapp:'💬',default:'📨'}; ✓✗ emoji in app.js(4486,4750,5044), command_palette.js:489, skill_proposals_modal/studio.
findings.fix: Replace remaining emoji with window.icon() helper or CSS status classes.

findings.description: Claim 'pytest 266->502'. Raw 'def test_' count = 491. Diff likely parametrized cases inflating the 502 figure. Not a material false claim — test coverage genuinely expanded substantially.
findings.evidence: grep -rh 'def test_' tests/ | wc -l = 491.

findings.description: template_gallery.js loaded via <script src> on every page but file does not exist (404 + console error). Template functionality folded into template_editor.js (wired), so no feature lost.
findings.evidence: index.html:109 <script src=/dashboard/components/template_gallery.js defer>; ls confirms file absent.

findings.description: 3 orphan WS listeners silently never fire. cobaia.queue_updated (listener cobaia_today_queue.js:160, mounted via cobaia_operator.js:347) has ZERO backend emit. sentry.issue_new (cobaia_sentry_banner.js:136) ZERO backend emit. sequence.enrolled (emitted sequences.py:310) has ZERO frontend listener. Operator Today-Queue + Sentry panels rely on 60s poll fallback, not real-time.
findings.evidence: grep queue_updated|sentry.issue_new across *.py = 0 emits; cobaia_operator.js:347 mounts CobaiaTodayQueue; sequences.py:310 emits sequence.enrolled with no listener.
findings.fix: Add backend emits for cobaia.queue_updated + sentry.issue_new OR remove dead listeners; add sequence.enrolled listener.

findings.description: WS payload field split: api/brain.py:110 broadcasts {type:event_type}; api/sequences.py:310 + api/skills.py:438 use {event_type:...}. Dashboard fan-out (app.js:3375) re-dispatches hermes-ws-event CustomEvent ONLY when event.event_type present -> brain.* events never reach component fan-out path, only handleWSEvent's event.type branch. Inconsistent contract.
findings.evidence: brain.py:110 {type:event_type}; sequences.py:310 event_type; app.js:3375 if(event.event_type) dispatchEvent(hermes-ws-event); app.js:3419-3434 separate event.type branch.
findings.fix: Standardize all routers to event_type (fix brain.py:110) OR make fan-out accept both type and event_type.

findings.description: 4 UX-RM migrations NOT applied in server.py lifespan (only cobaia_warmup_schedule applied at :166). MITIGATED: api modules self-apply via _apply_migration()/_ensure_table() on first request (sequences.py:67,120,133,150,173 verified). Loses centralized startup guarantee + startup-time error detection; lazy-init compensates.
findings.evidence: server.py grep shows only 2026_06_cobaia_warmup_schedule applied (:166,172). sequences.py:67 def _apply_migration called at :120,133,150,173 on endpoints. Missing from lifespan: 2026_06_sequences, 2026_06_icp_profile, 2026_06_onboarding_state, 2026_06_daemon_sequence_inbox.
findings.fix: Apply 4 migrations in server.py lifespan for centralized guarantee.

findings.description: sequence_nodes schema divergence: migration has sequence_id INTEGER NOT NULL (no default) + node_type TEXT NOT NULL (no default); daemon/orchestrator.py:220 uses DEFAULT 0 / DEFAULT 'action'. CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hides it -> first creator wins, semantics diverge.
findings.evidence: migration lines16-25 vs orchestrator.py lines220-229.
findings.fix: Reconcile DEFAULT values between migration and daemon init.

findings.description: FOREIGN KEY ON DELETE CASCADE defined in migration (sequence_nodes/sequence_edges) but absent from daemon/orchestrator.py init. If daemon inits first, cascade unavailable; IF NOT EXISTS prevents constraint addition after.
findings.evidence: migration FK lines24,34; orchestrator.py lines220-237 no FK.
findings.fix: Add matching FK constraints to daemon init or centralize via migration-only.

findings.description: daemon_sequence_inbox tables (inbox_replies, sequence_enrollments, telegram_stop_signals) defined in BOTH orchestrator.py:193-243 AND 2026_06_daemon_sequence_inbox.sql. Both idempotent but maintenance burden doubles.
findings.evidence: orchestrator.py:193-243 identical schemas to migration file.
findings.fix: Single source of truth — keep migration, remove daemon inline CREATE.

findings.description: 128+ hardcoded px font-sizes despite F4 token claims: pipeline-studio.css(37), skill-proposals.css(32), onboarding.css(35), observability.css(22), typography.css(2) + inline JSX font-sizes in components. Should use --text-xs..--text-5xl tokens.
findings.evidence: pipeline-studio.css:35 font-size:18px; onboarding.css:103 font-size:20px; sequence_dry_run.js:65 font-size:1.2rem.

findings.description: Icon adoption incomplete. CHANNEL_ICONS bare emoji; ⚠️ emoji in status text (line146); ✓✗ status emoji across app.js/skill_proposals/command_palette/lab_fingerprint_diff. icon() helper + 71-icon sprite EXIST and work, but not consistently used.
findings.evidence: sequence_dry_run.js:18,146; window.icon() correctly implemented in icon.js:22; 71 symbols in index.html defs.
findings.fix: Route channel + status icons through window.icon() / CSS status classes.

findings.description: Inline backdrop-filter:blur() values bypass glass utility classes in 6 sites (styles.css blur24/20/8/4/16, index.html:2070 blur8, sequence_dry_run.js:49 + sequence_enroll_modal.js:52). Glass classes correctly defined + selectively applied (no glass on tables/feeds — confirmed_ok), but overlays use inline instead of .glass-floating/.glass-overlay.
findings.evidence: styles.css:59 blur(24px) saturate(1.3); index.html:2070 inline blur(8px).
findings.fix: Move inline backdrop-filter to glass utility classes.

findings.description: Endpoints registered but no frontend caller: POST /api/templates/render(templates.py:259), POST /api/brain/decide(189), POST /api/brain/replay/{run_id}, GET /api/brain/intents(347), DELETE /api/sequences/{seq_id}(199). Likely intentional internal/admin APIs, not necessarily dead.
findings.evidence: grep templates/render + brain/decide + brain/intents in dashboard/ = 0 callers.
findings.fix: Triage: mark internal-only or remove if truly unused.

findings.description: Untested: HermesDaemon.run() main loop + DaemonState machine; api/brain.py queue-stats(304) + list_intents endpoints. Sequence enrollment methods ARE tested (test_ux_rm_f6c_orchestration.py).
findings.evidence: no test exercises run() loop; brain.py:304 queue-stats untested.
findings.fix: Add tests for daemon run loop state transitions + brain queue-stats.

findings.description: Indices idx_inbox_replies_handled + idx_seq_enrollments_due defined in both migration and orchestrator.py:242. Idempotent via CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS — cosmetic.
findings.evidence: migration lines15-26 vs orchestrator.py:242-243.

findings.description: Unused 'stub':True metadata in cobaia_intent.py:104 args dict — never read/evaluated. Real stub guard is orchestrator.py:826 checking dispatch_result.get('stub') from VM response. Harmless cargo-cult from F.7 C2.
findings.evidence: line104 returns args with 'stub':True; field never read in codebase.

findings.description: ZERO MOCKS claim VERIFIED. api/pipelines.py zero random import/calls; stub_execute_skill deleted (0 grep); generate_search_results returns {source:unavailable,profiles:[],simulated:False} empty fallback. Most important cobaia claim — genuinely true.
findings.evidence: grep random in pipelines.py=0; grep stub_execute_skill=0; test_ux_rm_f1a_mock_kill.py 8 gate tests.

findings.description: BLACKLIST R2 (5 files) INTACT. stealth.py(616), human.py(385), preflight.py(133), cooldown.py(210), ollama_router.py(154) last touched in early commits far before UX-RM window. Zero monkeypatch/setattr/sys.modules manipulation. Working tree clean. Consistent with 68 SS claim.
findings.evidence: git log: blacklist commits e5dcbe2/472857f/cbddf9e/d4868fc precede UX-RM; blob hashes match HEAD; clean working tree.

findings.description: Legit randomness correctly preserved + distinguished from fake data. template_renderer.py:23 random.choice (spintax {a|b|c}); send_scheduler.py:92 random.randint (anti-detection jitter). Both documented exceptions in MCP-BANNED-PATTERNS.json — NOT mocks.
findings.evidence: template_renderer.py:23 spintax; send_scheduler.py:92 noqa anti-detection jitter; linkedin/* scroll/click randomness intact.

findings.description: Brain confirm drawer FULLY WIRED for all destructive intents. DESTRUCTIVE_ACTIONS frozenset gates send_outreach/send_message/send_inmail/synth_skill_promote/deploy_skill_pr + confidence<0.5. POST /api/brain/confirm/{run_id} returns 200; drawer mounted + WS handler active.
findings.evidence: safety.py:16-22 frozenset; intents.py send_outreach destructive:True; api/brain.py confirm endpoint; brain_confirm_drawer.js mounted.

findings.description: Cobaia activation chain INTACT, no mock fallback. POST /api/linkedin/cobaia/start-warmup -> mgr.start_warmup() -> real INSERT cobaia_warmup_state -> WS cobaia.warmup_started -> CobaiaOperator mounts operator mode with live KPI/timeline feeds.
findings.evidence: api/cobaia.py:82 calls mgr.start_warmup(); cobaia_warmup.py:135 real DB insert; api/cobaia.py:93 _ws_emit; cobaia_operator.js WS handler.

findings.description: R5 per-role bearer infra complete (12 env vars). Requester NOT passed in body (spoof-blocked, dispatch.py:155 explicit comment). derive_requester rejects shared bearer with denied_strict when strict_bearer=True. Fail-closed default policy verified (this is WHY REGRESSION-1/2 bite — hardening works correctly).
findings.evidence: requester.py:16-29 12 vars; dispatch.py:155 'R5: requester NOT in body'; access_matrix.py defaults deny + CRITICAL log on missing file.

remediation_roadmap.scope: Gateway access_matrix: add hermes-llm + hermes-hunter to correct requester allow-lists, restart, smoke-test
remediation_roadmap.cobaia_blocking: partial — recommend before Day14 if cobaia uses brain LLM routing or email verify

remediation_roadmap.scope: Delete template_gallery.js ref; add cobaia.queue_updated + sentry.issue_new backend emits OR remove dead listeners; standardize WS field to event_type; add sequence.enrolled listener
remediation_roadmap.cobaia_blocking: no — poll fallback keeps cobaia observable

remediation_roadmap.scope: Apply 4 UX-RM migrations in server.py lifespan; reconcile sequence_nodes DEFAULTs + FK; collapse dual schema source-of-truth
Tokenize 128+ px font-sizes; replace 23 emoji with icon(); move inline backdrop-filter to glass classes
Test daemon run() loop + brain queue-stats/list_intents; remove stub:True cargo-cult; dedupe indices; triage orphan endpoints
